prompt_rules.description_brief: Write in a polished, premium Etsy voice for RugsShopTurkey. Keep the description warm and elegant, with 1 opening sentence plus 2-3 short story paragraphs. Make the rug feel one-of-a-kind, handmade, and authentically Anatolian. Do not copy fixed sample sizes or SKU values; always use the actual product data dynamically.
prompt_rules.description_example_template:
{opening}

{hikaye}

Rug Details
✤ Authentic Vintage Turkish {tip} Rug
✤ Handmade & Hand-Knotted
✤ Material: 50% Wool - 50% Cotton

✤ Pattern: {pattern}
✤ Size: {rounded_ft_label} ({boyut_ft} ft)
✤ Dimensions: {boyut_cm} cm
✤ SKU: {urun_id}

Every vintage rug is unique and carries its own story, texture, and handmade character that machine-made rugs simply cannot replicate.

Shipping
✤ Ships within 1-2 business days
✤ Fast delivery via DHL, FedEx, or TNT
✤ Estimated arrival: 2-4 business days
✤ FREE Worldwide Shipping
✤ No hidden costs - customs duties included

Care Instructions
✤ Made from natural wool and cotton
✤ Spot clean with mild detergent and cold water
✤ Use a soft brush for dust and pet hair
✤ Machine washing is NOT recommended

Returns & Support
We want you to truly love your rug. If you are not fully satisfied with your purchase, you can easily start the return process.
Feel free to message us anytime - we are always happy to answer your questions quickly.
